description_long: This is a single-story suburban house with a light blue exterior and white trim, featuring a spacious open-plan interior layout. The house includes multiple rooms such as bedrooms, a kitchen, a living area, and bathrooms, all visible through the cutaway design. Large windows are distributed across the facade, allowing ample natural light into the living spaces. The backyard is enclosed by a white fence and contains outdoor furniture, potted plants, and mature trees, creating a private garden area. The main entrance is centrally located and leads directly into the living space, with a small overhang above the door. The roof is flat, and the overall design is simple and functional, typical of modern ranch-style homes.
description: A single-story, light blue ranch-style house with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced backyard featuring trees and outdoor seating.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and a glimpse of the open-plan interior with visible living and dining areas.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with patio furniture, trees, and the white perimeter fence, as well as the rear rooms of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the garden area, mature trees, and the back facade with additional windows and access to the outdoor space.
description_view_3: Side view focusing on the bedrooms and bathrooms, with the backyard and garden visible to the left.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small overhang, and no porch or steps, framed by large windows.
